{info:title=Источник}
Сгенерировано из: {{docs/habr-unique-projects/software-pairs/README.md}}
Дата: 2026-04-29
{info}

h1. software-pairs

_Файлов:_ 6

h2. Содержание

* [1-workflow-llm-mcp.md|1-workflow-llm-mcp.md] — 
* [2-pkm-mcp-skills.md|2-pkm-mcp-skills.md] — 
* [3-crdt-self-hosted.md|3-crdt-self-hosted.md] — 
* [4-speech-to-text-llm.md|4-speech-to-text-llm.md] — 
* [5-browser-agents-headless.md|5-browser-agents-headless.md] — 
* [6-metaphor.md|6-metaphor.md] — 



----

_Похожие документы:_
* [README|docs/nautilus/composite-skills-agents-companion-mentors/README.md] (сходство 0.21)
* [README|docs/habr-unique-projects/hardware-pairs/README.md] (сходство 0.21)
* [README|docs/anthropic-vacancies/nautilus-pro2-analysis/README.md] (сходство 0.17)
